item.title: 南非财政部称可承受伊朗战争等冲击
item.description: 南非国家财政部负责人表示，该国更强劲的公共财政状况为其提供了可观的缓冲空间，足以抵御外部冲击——例如伊朗冲突引发的连锁反应。【原文：South Africa’s stronger public finances have given the county a sizable cushion to absorb external shocks — such as the fallout from the conflict in Iran, according to the head of the National Treasury.】

item.title: 马斯克收购推特前的推文成为新审判焦点
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克2022年试图退出收购推特公司的短暂努力，成为本周开庭审理的焦点。该诉讼指控这位全球首富操纵公司股价以谋取更有利的交易条件。【原文：Elon Musk’s brief effort to back out of buying Twitter Inc. in 2022 is the focus of a trial starting this week over claims the world’s richest person manipulated the company’s stock price to get himself a better deal.】

item.title: 美国制造业增长，伊朗袭击前投入成本飙升
item.description: 美国制造业在2月份实现扩张，但投入价格飙升至2022年以来最快增速，这在周末伊朗遭袭事件发生前就已引发通胀卷土重来的担忧。【原文：US manufacturing expanded in February but input prices soared at the fastest pace since 2022, stoking fears of an inflation resurgence even before this weekend’s attacks on Iran.】

item.title: 富达管理资产规模突破7.1万亿美元，营收跃升15%
item.description: 富达投资作为全球第三大资产管理公司，创下历史最佳业绩：其基金资产规模增长逾1万亿美元，自2024年以来收入飙升15%。【原文：Fidelity Investments, the world’s third-largest asset manager, reported a record year, with assets in its funds rising by more than $1 trillion and revenue jumping 15% since 2024.】

item.title: 摩根大通下周将启动550亿美元收购EA的债务交易
item.description: 据知情人士透露，摩根大通公司将于下周正式启动为艺电公司创纪录杠杆收购案发售银团贷款的流程。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is set to formally start the process next week of selling syndicated debt for the record leveraged buyout of Electronic Arts Inc., according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 股市下跌，波动率飙升，交易员权衡伊朗战争风险
item.description: 周一早盘股市下跌，交易员们正评估中东冲突升级带来的市场风险，油价飙升，特朗普总统表示美国和以色列对伊朗的打击行动可能持续数周。【原文：Stocks dropped Monday morning as traders weighed the market risks from an escalating conflict in the Middle East, with oil spiking and President Donald Trump saying the US and Israeli strikes on Iran may last weeks.】

item.title: 冰岛央行行长戴维·奥德松在金融危机期间履职，享年78岁
item.description: 冰岛任职时间最长的总理大卫·奥德松去世，享年78岁。他在该国银行体系崩溃期间曾担任中央银行行长。【原文：David Oddsson, Iceland’s longest-serving prime minister who oversaw its central bank when the nation’s banking system collapsed, has died. He was 78.】

item.title: 中东买家无惧导弹袭击 继续全球采购狂潮
item.description: 中东投资者周一继续其全球收购狂潮，宣布了两笔大额交易，并驳斥了伊朗冲突可能至少在短期内影响该地区交易活动的担忧。【原文：Middle Eastern investors continued their global acquisition spree on Monday, unveiling a pair of big-ticket transactions and brushing off concerns that the Iran conflict could dent regional dealmaking activity at least in the short term.】

item.title: 摩根大通银行家称人工智能将改变信贷市场运作方式
item.description: 摩根大通全球信贷交易主管表示，生成式人工智能将彻底改变信贷交易员的工作方式，因为该技术特别适合处理该资产类别产生的非结构化数据。【原文：Generative AI is set to transform the way credit traders do their jobs, as the technology is well suited to handling the unstructured data produced by the asset class, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s global head of credit trading.】

item.title: 乌兹别克斯坦最大黄金矿商在创纪录价格下延长出口禁令
item.description: 乌兹别克斯坦作为全球最大的黄金生产国之一，在国际地缘政治动荡导致金价创下历史新高之际，已开始囤积其黄金产量。【原文：Uzbekistan, one of the world’s largest gold producers, has taken to hoarding its output of the yellow metal as prices hit records amid global geopolitical turmoil.】

item.title: 美国天然气期货价格随全球天然气、原油价格同步上涨
item.description: 美国天然气期货价格最高上涨7.4%，与全球天然气价格走势一致。受中东地区冲突再度升级以及卡塔尔关闭全球最大液化天然气工厂影响，全球天然气价格已大幅攀升。【原文：US natural gas futures rose as much as 7.4% in sympathy with global gas prices, which have surged in response to renewed conflict in the Middle East and Qatar shutting liquefied natural gas production at the world’s largest LNG plant.】

item.title: 防务公司将启动法兰克福IPO计划，尽管与伊朗存在冲突
item.description: 知情人士透露，尽管中东冲突导致股市动荡，德国防务技术公司Vincorion仍将于本周在法兰克福正式启动首次公开募股（IPO）的营销活动。【原文：German defense technology firm Vincorion is set to begin formally marketing its initial public offering in Frankfurt this week, despite equity markets being roiled by conflict in the Middle East, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 苹果推出iPhone 17e和搭载M4芯片的iPad Air，开启新品浪潮
item.description: 苹果公司发布了最新款低端智能手机iPhone 17e以及性能更强的iPad Air，由此掀起新一轮产品浪潮。【原文：Apple Inc. unveiled the iPhone 17e, the latest version of its lower-end smartphone, and a faster version of the iPad Air, kicking off a wave of new products.】

item.title: 巴西奥里杰姆公司转向地下天然气储存以增强电网
item.description: 巴西能源公司Origem Energia SA计划在该国地下岩洞储存天然气，以此作为价格对冲策略，旨在支撑该国依赖可再生能源的电网，并吸引耗电量巨大的数据中心。【原文：Origem Energia SA plans to store natural gas in caverns in Brazil in a price hedging strategy to shore up the nation’s renewable-reliant grid and attract power-hungry data centers.】

item.title: 纳斯达克计划推出纳斯达克100指数的预测市场"是或否"期权
item.description: 纳斯达克公司计划推出期权合约，允许投资者对主要股指进行"是/否"押注，成为最新一家在快速增长的预测市场中推出创新产品的交易所运营商。【原文：Nasdaq Inc. plans to roll out options contracts that would allow yes-or-no bets on a major stock index, the latest exchange operator to put its own spin on fast-growing prediction markets.】

item.title: 加拿大央行警告供应冲击可能需要采取限制措施
item.description: 加拿大央行一位高级官员警告称，如果供应冲击对通胀产生重大且持久的影响，即使在经济疲软的情况下，也可能需要采取政策收紧措施。【原文：A senior Bank of Canada official warned policy restraint may be needed if a supply shock has a large and persistent impact on inflation, even in a scenario where the economy is weakened.】

item.title: 安联投资关注美元走势，中东冲突重燃避险资产押注
item.description: 安联环球投资公司正考虑买入美元，此前数月该公司一直押注美元走弱。随着中东战争重燃美元作为避险资产的地位，该公司转变了策略。【原文：Allianz Global Investors is considering purchasing dollars after months betting against the US currency as the war in the Middle East revives its status as a haven asset.】

item.title: 甲骨文健康业务高管离职，埃里森押注陷入困境
item.description: 甲骨文公司旗下医疗记录部门近月来接连失去多位高级管理人员，而该公司正面临客户流失的严峻局面，亟需推进软件现代化进程。【原文：Oracle Corp.’s health records division has lost multiple senior leaders in recent months while the company works to modernize its software in the face of steep customer loses.】

item.title: 巴拉圭央行行长面临低通胀的"甜蜜烦恼"
item.description: 卡洛斯·卡瓦略面临着令多数央行行长羡慕的难题：巴拉圭通胀率略显低迷，这位货币当局主席正着手降息以提振物价。【原文：Carlos Carvallo faces a challenge most central bankers would envy. Inflation is a touch too low in Paraguay and the monetary authority’s chairman is starting to cut rates in an effort to boost prices.】

item.title: 凯斯市场主管称私募信贷担忧被夸大
item.description: 魁北克储蓄投资基金去年未能达到多项收益基准——但在私募信贷领域却表现亮眼，该集团在此领域实现了9.6%的回报率。【原文：Pension manager Caisse de Depot et Placement du Quebec missed many of its return benchmarks last year — but not in private credit, where the group earned a 9.6% return.】

item.title: 英伟达将向数据中心光通信公司投资40亿美元
item.description: 英伟达公司同意向两家开发数据中心光学的公司投资40亿美元，这些技术对人工智能系统至关重要。【原文：Nvidia Corp. agreed to invest $4 billion in two companies that develop data center optics that are essential for artificial intelligence systems.】

item.title: 伊朗危机正加剧石油市场的看涨趋势
item.description: 对桶装商品过剩的担忧正转向对其安全性的忧虑。【原文：Expectations for a glut of barrels are shifting to concerns about their safety.】

item.title: 旅游预订平台Navan推出人工智能"行政助理"
item.description: 纳文公司正推出一款人工智能助手，旨在帮助其企业差旅预订平台赢得更多企业客户。【原文：Navan Inc. is rolling out an artificial-intelligence assistant aimed at helping the corporate travel-booking platform win more business customers.】

item.title: 交易员削减对英国央行降息的押注，认为3月降息概率不足50%
item.description: 交易员大幅削减对英国央行降息的押注，此前能源价格飙升加剧了通胀担忧。【原文：Traders aggressively trimmed bets on Bank of England interest-rate cuts, after soaring energy prices fueled inflation fears.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：AES、亚马逊、美国航空、埃克森美孚、UniQure
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点45分，标普500指数期货下跌1.2%，伊朗爆发军事冲突令全球市场动荡不安。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down 1.2% as of 7:45 a.m. in New York as the eruption of military conflict in Iran rattled global markets.】

item.title: 黑石旗下BREIT基金净流入创2022年以来新高
item.description: 黑石集团面向高净值人士设立的550亿美元房地产基金上月首次实现资金净流入，这是自2022年以来该基金首次在投资者资金流入超过支出的情况下实现盈利，表明商业地产领域市场情绪正在回升。【原文：Blackstone Inc.’s $55 billion real estate fund for wealthy individuals last month took in more money from investors than it paid out for the first time since 2022, a sign of rebounding sentiment in the commercial-property sector.】

item.title: 亚马逊人工智能支出激增致股价创数年最差月度表现
Anthropic的Claude聊天机器人对数千用户服务中断
item.description: 据监测网站Downdetector报道，人工智能公司Anthropic旗下热门聊天机器人Claude于周一遭遇服务中断，数千名用户报告了相关问题。【原文：Anthropic PBC’s popular artificial intelligence chatbot Claude experienced service disruptions on Monday, with thousands of users reporting issues, according to monitoring website Downdetector.】

item.title: 中东冲突对全球韧性构成又一次压力测试
item.description: 过去一年间，经济学家们一直在模拟唐纳德·特朗普混乱的贸易战可能带来的影响。如今，他们评估的是一场真实的贸易战。【原文：For the past year, economists have modeled the impact of Donald Trump’s chaotic trade war. Now, it’s a real war they’re assessing.】

item.title: 特朗普抛弃经济外交，转向战争的强权政治
item.description: 通过关税等手段施加经济压力已显现其局限性【原文：Economic arm-twisting with tools like tariffs showed its limitations】
